name: Hana Koa Brewing Co.
tagline: Oahu's best brewery in a converted Coca-Cola factory — tropical IPAs, spacious beer garden, and rotating food pop-ups.
parking: Street parking in Kakaako; some lot spaces
talkStory: Occupying a converted Coca-Cola syrup factory in Kakaako, Hana Koa is widely considered the best brewery on Oahu. The spacious industrial taproom serves excellent locally brewed beers — from tropical IPAs to dark stouts — along with a creative food menu. The Kolsch and the IPA are the standouts. Thursday-Saturday evenings are liveliest; check for food truck pop-ups. Local families come for the beer garden atmosphere.
